title: Quikr is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Quikr is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quikr family as a Full Stack Developer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quikr:
Quikr is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr!
